world.title: US-Israel-Iran War Live: Hormuz sees first tanker movement in weeks, but Tehran signals strait may close again
world.description: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: US President Donald Trump said negotiations with Iran are progressing well, but officials in Iran insist the US must lift its blockade on Iranian ports for the Strait of Hormuz to remain open. Tehran has also rejected claims that it agreed to transfer enriched uranium abroad, calling it a firm red line. Meanwhile, the US Central Command reported that 21 vessels have complied with orders to turn back since the blockade began on April 13. Analysts highlight significant differences in how both sides describe the ongoing talks. In a sign of limited maritime movement, a passenger cruise ship recently crossed the strait for the first time since the conflict began. Separately, US naval authorities denied reports of food shortages aboard deployed warships in the region. Follow indiatoday.in for all live updates.
